name: Remote Access: Cisco's Untold Story
description: Aberdeen Group examines Cisco Systems' remote access strategy as of November 1996, revealing Cisco's 'untold story' of quietly dominating the enterprise branch-to-branch segment (60%+ market share) while making aggressive inroads into the high-end ISP and carrier markets with the AS5200 access server. The study evaluates Cisco's multi-product portfolio (AS5200, 3600, 1600 series), IOS software competitive advantages, and the Telebit MICA technology acquisition, predicting Cisco is better positioned than competitors to serve the rapidly evolving ISP/carrier market.
